zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Talbot於大約1364年出生在英國賀福爾理查茲 卡素時，她的父親Sir John Talbot28歲，母親Catherine de Bromwich27歲。她於1383年之前與Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekne結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1407年8月3日在英國享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文哈可姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Talbot于大约1364年出生在英国賀福爾理查茲 卡素时，她的父亲Sir John Talbot28岁，母亲Catherine de Bromwich27岁。她于1383年之前与Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekne结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1407年8月3日在英国享年44岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文哈可姆。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Talbot was born about 1364, in Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England, her father, Sir John Talbot, was 28 and her mother, Catherine de Bromwich, was 27. She married Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekne before 1383. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. She died on 3 August 1407, in England, at the age of 44, and was buried in Haccombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Talbot est née environ 1364, à Richards Castle, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Talbot, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Catherine de Bromwich, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekne avant 1383. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 août 1407, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Haccombe, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Talbot um 1364 in Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Talbot 28 und ihre Mutter Catherine de Bromwich 27. Sie hat vor 1383 Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. August 1407 im Alter von 44 Jahren in England und wurde in Haccombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Talbot è nata il circa 1364 nel Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Sir John Talbot, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Catherine de Bromwich, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekne prima del 1383. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì il 3 agosto 1407, nel England, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolta a Haccombe, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Talbotが約1364年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリチャーズ カストルで生まれた時，父Sir John Talbotは28歳，母Catherine de Bromwichは27歳であった。1383年以前にWarin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1407年8月3日にイギリスで44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンハッコインベにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Talbot(이)가 대략 1364년 영국 허퍼드실르 리처스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Talbot(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine de Bromwich(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1383년 이전 Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1407년 8월 3일 영국에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 하c코브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Talbot nasceu aproximadamente 1364, em Richards Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Talbot, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Catherine de Bromwich, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekne antes 1383. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de agosto de 1407, em Inglaterra, com 44 anos, e foi sepultada em Haccombe, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Talbot родилась около 1364 г. в местности ричардс кастл, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Talbot было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine de Bromwich, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekne перед 1383 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 3 августа 1407 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности хаккомб, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Talbot nació aproximadamente 1364, en Richards Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Talbot, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Catherine de Bromwich, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekne antes de 1383. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió el 3 de agosto de 1407, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultada en Haccombe, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
